steps.title: Convert furlongs to feet
steps.content:
Use both conversion factors: $1$ furlong is $220$ yards, and $1$ yard is $3$ feet. That means each furlong is this many feet:
$$220\cdot3=660$$

steps.title: Multiply by the distance
steps.content:
Now multiply by the $108$ furlongs.
$$108\cdot660=71{,}280$$
The answer is 71280.
